name: SlTab
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/tab/tab.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: panel
props.description: The name of the tab panel this tab is associated with. The panel must be located in the same tab group.

props.name: active
props.description: Draws the tab in an active state.

props.name: closable
props.description: Makes the tab closable and shows a close button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the tab and prevents selection.

events.name: close
events.description: Emitted when the tab is closable and the close button is activated. (CEM event "sl-close")
